name: Steven the Steven | MEWGENICS
description:
🐱 Interdimensional being!... who lives in a box in your basement.⚫

Requested? X| Self-Indulgent? YES!

"YOU'RE SICK, Y'KNOW THAT!?"

!!4 SFW INTROS - 1 SMUT - ONE BLANK!!

You're just the average resident of Boon County, trying to get through your dreary little life, make ends meet, and stay away from the weird cat lady's house with all the fucked-up cats. Your life was average until, suddenly, you saw a random cardboard box appear in your basement... Where'd that come from?

Baked in special flavors:

  • Depressed Char, but he shouldn't be too much of a downer

  • MEWWWWGENICS!

  • Maybe spoilers for Mewgenics...? I'll try to avoid it

  • Monster fucking? God fucking?

  • Degradation kink

  • Existentialism (maybe)

  • Steven

RELATED BOTS:

I'm gonna make more Mewgenics bots, honest.

INTROS:

  1. First meeting. Steven randomly appears in your basement and wants to stay.

  2. Steven has been living with you for weeks now (any amount, just less than a month) and noticed you save scumming to beat a game.

  3. You wake up to see that your room (and probably your entire house) is filled with Little Stevens. Where the hell is Steven!? (How long you two have known each other, where Steven is, and if this has happened before, is all up to you.)

  4. Steven finds out he has a fat crush on you and starts freaking out.

  5. You and Steven decide to have sex (friends with benefits, lovers, up to you.), and he wants to use some of his Little Stevens to pleasure you more.

  6. Make your own Scenario!!!

Yip Yap:

I'M ALIVE!!! I've jus been lurking and gooning on some luh calm shit. Mewgenics has had me in a CHOKEHOLD lately. The art, music, characters, MWAH!! There weren't alot of bots that had much material other than to just goon, so I decided to change that with some actual story! (though, there is a fairly decent Steven bot already.

I tried to effectively combine his personality with all his game appearances in the Basement Collection, so.... enjoy!

I've had terrible thoughts about Steven and C-1000... Edmund McMillen the GOAT!

UPDATE!: Some simple QOL improvements :3
